description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a heavily armored, angular body with a matte dark gray finish and orange accents. The front is equipped with a prominent reinforced bumper, visible weapon mounts, and rugged, articulated wheel assemblies designed for urban and off-road maneuverability. The vehicle's sides display thick, sloped armor panels, small vision ports, and robust, oversized wheels with deep treads for enhanced traction. The rear includes additional armor plating, a central exhaust, and a raised spoiler for stability. The roof is fitted with aerodynamic fins and what appears to be a hatch or sensor module. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and mobility in hostile urban environments.
description: A heavily armored, dark gray combat tactical vehicle with orange accents, reinforced bumpers, and oversized rugged wheels. It features visible weapon mounts, sloped armor, and a robust, angular design for urban operations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the reinforced bumper, central weapon mount, angular armor, and wide, articulated wheel assemblies.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sloped armor panels, large rugged wheels, orange suspension details, and roof fins.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the armored back, central exhaust, rear spoiler, and additional orange-accented armor panels.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same armor, wheels, and visible weapon mount details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large central weapon mount on the front bumper, with additional smaller mounts on the front fenders.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor panels on the front, sides, and rear; reinforced bumpers and modular side panels are visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark gray with orange accent panels; no camouflage pattern present.
attribute_tire_type: Four oversized, deep-tread off-road tires with reinforced sidewalls.
